problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Enzymatic. Enzymatic depolymerization of specific polymer directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
